title: epipactis × barlae
intro: Epipactis × barlae, also known as the Barlae's helleborine or hybrid helleborine, is a rare orchid plant hybrid derived from the Epipactis palustris and Epipactis atrorubens species. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Epipactis × barlae include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Epipactis × barlae is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
